ogTitle: Ellis Lane vs Elong Elong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ellis Lane and Elong Elong.
heading: Ellis Lane vs Elong Elong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ellis Lane, New South Wales and Elong Elong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elong Elong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ellis Lane (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ellis Lane or Elong Elong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ellis Lane has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Elong Elong scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ellis Lane scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Elong Elong scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ellis Lane or Elong Elong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elong Elong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
